description: Train a molecular graph neural network (gcn, gat, attentivefp, mpnn, or dmpnn) on a MoleculeNet benchmark (tox21/bbbp/bace/hiv/delaney/freesolv/lipo) or a custom SMILES CSV, then evaluate it on train/valid/test.
rules: read-only / local — reads a CSV (or downloads a MoleculeNet benchmark) and writes a report; no remote or live service is mutated
exactly one of DATASET (MoleculeNet) or DATA_CSV (custom) must be set
custom CSVs are split with the scaffold splitter and featurized with MolGraphConvFeaturizer
report (dataset info, training log, evaluation metrics) written to record_store
needs deepchem[torch] (GNN models) + RDKit at run time; porter degrades gracefully if absent
usage: Set MODEL (gcn|gat|attentivefp|mpnn|dmpnn). Then either DATASET (a MoleculeNet name) OR DATA_CSV + TASK_TYPE (classification|regression) + TARGETS (space-separated columns) + SMILES_COL. EPOCHS sets training epochs. Output: gnn_train.txt.
limitation: Not hermetic offline — GNN training requires deepchem with a torch backend, RDKit, and (for benchmarks) network access. Without them the porter writes gnn_train.txt noting the missing dependency and exits 0.
